caption: A man with glasses, a white shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders wears a large, grey, textured wig and black headphones while recording a podcast. He sits in a room with walls covered in framed photographs and clothing on racks, including a shirt labeled "LEE". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On-screen graphics in the lower corners display logos with the text "TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing as he gestures with his hands. His head shifts slightly, and his expression remains focused as he addresses someone off-screen. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment.
